name: 网页自动化
examples_zh: 启动 agent-browser 会话，获取仪表盘页面快照和元素 refs，点击"新建项目"并返回结构化 JSON。
在同一个浏览器会话中打开后台列表页，按快照中的 refs 依次设置搜索词、状态筛选和分页。
抓取结算页的紧凑快照，定位优惠码输入框 ref，输入测试码后输出订单总价变化。
examples_en: Start an agent-browser session, capture the dashboard snapshot with element refs, click "New Project," and return structured JSON.
In the same browser session, open the admin list page and use snapshot refs to set the search term, status filter, and pagination.
Capture a compact checkout-page snapshot, locate the coupon input ref, enter a test code, and output the order total change.
